title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-472-H. Revision: H. Type: specification. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2023-08-24. Last modified: 2024-08-17. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1162, P-1140.
